intendedUse: internal CardHawk valuation and market analysis

officialDocumentationReviewed.label: eBay Browse API documentation
officialDocumentationReviewed.conclusion: Documents Browse API active listing/search capabilities and application token requirement; does not establish eBay Product Research canonical sold-data access or CardHawk permission.

officialDocumentationReviewed.label: eBay Buy APIs Requirements
officialDocumentationReviewed.conclusion: Documents partner-oriented production access, approval, and contract requirements; does not grant CardHawk Product Research sold-data licensing or commercial/internal-use permission.

officialDocumentationReviewed.label: CardHawk eBay acquisition architecture
officialDocumentationReviewed.conclusion: Documents that current eBay canonical acquisition is skeleton/fixture-backed only, with no approved live transaction-level sold-data source.

currentKnownCapabilities: eBay Browse API documentation describes active listing/search capabilities.
CardHawk production eBay marketplace supports active listing discovery through the existing eBay marketplace path.
CardHawk eBay canonical acquisition adapter has skeleton and fixture-backed behavior only.
eBay canonical acquisition live mode is not implemented and no approved live sold-data endpoint is selected.
currentKnownNonCapabilities: No approved eBay Product Research canonical sold-data source is recorded.
No CardHawk eBay Product Research commercial/internal-use permission is recorded.
No transaction-level sold-evidence support is established for live canonical ingestion.
No accepted-offer visibility support is established for live canonical ingestion.
No Canonical Sold Evidence write authority is granted.

researchRecords.intendedUse: internal CardHawk valuation and market analysis

officialTermsOrLicense.label: eBay Buy APIs Requirements
officialTermsOrLicense.notes: Official eBay Buy API requirements describe partner-oriented production access, approvals, contracts, and no guarantee of approval. This does not grant CardHawk Product Research sold-data permission.

apiDocumentation.label: eBay Browse API documentation
apiDocumentation.notes: Official eBay Browse API documentation describes active item discovery/search endpoints and application access token requirements. It does not establish eBay Product Research API availability, canonical transaction-level sold evidence access, accepted-offer visibility, or CardHawk commercial/internal-use permission.

salesDataClaims.summary: Reviewed Browse/Buy API documentation does not establish Product Research sold-data access for CardHawk.

transactionLevelEvidenceClaims.summary: Transaction-level sold-data access remains unconfirmed for eBay Product Research.

acceptedOfferVisibilityClaims.summary: Accepted-offer visibility remains unconfirmed for eBay Product Research.

commercialUseClaims.summary: Official Buy API production access requirements do not grant CardHawk commercial-use permission for Product Research sold data.

apiAvailability.summary: Browse API availability is documented, but eBay Product Research API availability for CardHawk canonical sold evidence remains unknown.

licensingStatus.summary: Production access requires approvals/contracts; no CardHawk Product Research license or approval is documented.
